steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The final sentence provides the crucial detail: “Many critics focus their attention on art that is cryptic or overtly challenging.” This single fact explains the gap in the passage.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
“Accessible” fits because it expresses straightforward, easy-to-understand art — the opposite of the cryptic or challenging work that engages critics. The other choices don't explain why critics would overlook the paintings: innovative and subversive suggest qualities critics value, while profound doesn't create the necessary opposition.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
